title: It's Cobblin' Time
description: Catch, battle, and explore with Cobblemon in stunning biomes, with quality-of-life upgrades, creative building tools, secure multiplayer, and optimized performance for a seamless, immersive Minecraft experience.
body:
# It's Cobblin' Time! It's Cobblin' Time aims to be the perfect lightweight Cobblemon modpack with some quality of life mods to enhance vanilla mechanics. This modpack will give you a fantastic Vanilla+ experience, whether you're playing on the official It's Cobblin' Time server, on your own singleplayer world, or even hosting your own server for friends. ## Core Features ### Cobblemon - Cobblemon: Catch, train, and battle your favorite pixelated creatures in a vast and dynamic world. - Cobblemon Add-ons: Make the Cobblemon experience more immersive with enhancements like Fight or Flight mechanics, and the ability to ride your Cobblemon. ### Exploration - Antique Atlas: Navigate your world with a beautiful, hand-drawn-style map for adventurers. - Terralith: Transform your world with stunning new biomes and landscapes. ### Quality-of-Life Enhancements: - Comforts: Rest easier with sleeping bags and hammocks, allowing you to skip nights and reset spawn points. - Elytra Slot: Keep your wings equipped without sacrificing your chestplate. - Sophisticated Backpacks & Storage: Organize your inventory with customizable backpacks and smart storage solutions. - Mouse Tweaks & InvMove: Streamline your item management and movement for an intuitive interface. ### Building & Decoration: - Chipped: Unleash your creativity with an expanded palette of beautifully retextured blocks. - Supplementaries: Add functional and decorative items, from signs to chandeliers, to enhance your builds. - Handcrafted: Enjoy handcrafted aesthetics with detailed furniture and accessories. ### Protection & Utilities: - Flan: Secure your builds with land-claiming tools, perfect for multiplayer gameplay. Includes a Cobblemon extension to stop Pokemon spawning in your claim. - No Chat Reports: Keep your server experience private and secure. ### Performance Boosters: - Lithium, Sodium & FerriteCore: Experience a smoother game with optimized performance and reduced lag. - Dynamic FPS: Improve performance when your game is running in the background. - EntityCulling & More Culling: Optimize rendering for better frame rates without sacrificing detail.
